programme.title: High Crimes
programme.desc: A woman's life becomes embroiled in a huge military cover-up when it's revealed her husband is not who he says he is.

programme.title: Blown Away
programme.desc: Jeff Bridges and Tommy Lee Jones team up for this action-filled, edge-of-your-seat thriller about a mad bomber terrorizing Boston. Forest Whitaker and Lloyd Bridges co-star.

programme.title: Drive
programme.desc: A Hollywood stunt performer (Ryan Gosling) who moonlights as a wheelman discovers that a contract has been put on him after a heist gone wrong.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Talk about a Rush! The next stop on the World Poker Tour season is the largest poker tournament in northern California history, as the WPT and Lucky Chances Casino host the Gold Rush Tournament with its half a million dollar prize pool.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Foxwoods, the world's largest casino needs every inch of room to hold the talent at this week's World Poker Tour final table.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: The banks of the mighty Mississippi call the World Poker Tour back to where poker began for a prize pool of over one and a half million dollars - and it's the Devil's to lose.

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Berth Marks
programme.desc: Stanley and Oliver stumble into the wrong sleeping compartment on the train to Pottsville.

programme.title: The Return of Captain Invincible
programme.desc: In WWII, Captain Invincible used his powers against the Nazis, and was a hero. But when they accused him of supporting the Communists he retired to Australia. Now, after a super weapon is stolen he's asked to help. Unfortunately, he's an alcoholic now.

programme.title: I'm Gonna Git You Sucka (1988)
programme.desc: This ultra-hip Comedy in the tradition of The Naked Gun and Airplane stars Keenan Ivory Wayans in an Action Adventure filled with screwball gags and side-splitting one-liners.

programme.title: But I'm a Cheerleader: But I'm a Cheerleader
programme.desc: A cheerleading-obsessed teenager is sent to a strict summer camp when her parents suspect her of being a lesbian.

programme.title: The Big Fight
programme.desc: Tien Peng and Cheung Ching-ching play the leaders of a rebel group of Chinese kung fu fighters in a Japanese occupied town at the height of the war.

programme.title: Hercules
programme.desc: For his enemies, the sword! For his princess, devotion! Hercules the mighty descended from the heavens, half-god and half-mortal, unleashed against the forces of evil as he quests to find the woman he loves.

programme.title: Good Kill
programme.desc: Ethan Hawke stars in this riveting look at the world of drone warfare, where combat unfolds like a first-person shooter game -- only with real lives at stake. With January Jones.

programme.title: The Wild Geese
programme.desc: A British banker hires a group of British mercenaries to rescue a deposed African President from the hands of a corrupt African dictator. Starring Richard Burton, Roger Moore and Richard Harris.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: Socialite Molly is released from prison after serving a 6-year sentence for the murder of her husband and sets out to prove her innocence with the help of Fran, an investigative reporter who uncovers a conspiracy of silence and a shocking secret.

programme.title: Despite The Falling Snow
programme.desc: In 1950s Moscow, communist Katya secretly spies for the Americans in the Cold War arms race. When she lands her biggest assignment, stealing secrets from rising government star Alexander, the last thing she expects is to fall in love with him.

programme.title: Watching Over You
programme.desc: Single mom Sarah moves into the suburbs and starts dating a firefighter, only to find herself the target of an obsessive neighborhood watchman who aims to prove he’s the best man to protect her… even if he has to create the danger himself.

programme.title: Meteor Apocalypse
programme.desc: In this End Times thriller, a gigantic meteor enters Earth's orbit and begins to disintegrate, showering the planet in poisonous debris.

programme.title: 40 Days and Nights
programme.desc: When a colossal tectonic shift causes the sea level to start rising, a microbiologist gathers the DNA of as many species as she can, while the military creates an "ark" in a desperate attempt to preserve life on Earth.

programme.title: Outpost 11
programme.desc: Set in an alternative past where steam power still rules the world, outpost 11 is the story of three soldiers manning a remote listening post in the Arctic Circle.

programme.title: Multiverse
programme.desc: Four brilliant students unleash a parallel reality during a quantum experiment, confronting deadly versions of themselves. As identities blur and tensions rise, only one version can survive—triggering a violent battle for existence and reality itself.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Robbie's crew faces a difficult job transporting a large home in dangerous conditions.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: There's a rough ride for Steve as he travels from Perth into the red heart of Australia.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Nick and Jo risk one last supply to a remote settlement as the wet season looms.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Congo Kivu
programme.desc: When the Congo gained it's independence it had the best road network in central Africa, but the situation has deteriorated and today only 2% of roads are paved; during the rainy season many parts of the country turn into a muddy bog.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Bangladesh
programme.desc: In Bangladesh, bamboo harvesters raft massive floats through treacherous waters to deliver their payload.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Guinea
programme.desc: Crossing the mountainous forests is a real challenge and it is vital to stay careful as ravines are 700 meters deep.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Ladakh
programme.desc: Ladakh, the most northern state of India, is one of the harshest environments in the world.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Laos
programme.desc: Landlocked and shrouded in historical mystery, Laos is home to dozens of forgotten tribes who reside in its vast rolling mountains and impenetrable jungles.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Invisible Knife
programme.desc: March must solve the mystery of how a man could be stabbed to death by an invisible knife, while attempting to summon The Devil during a black rite.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Strange Event at Roman Fall
programme.desc: A wife reports her husband, a reclusive mystery writer, has fallen off a cliff. Suspicion points to her as the killer and Colonel March investigates.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Headless Hat
programme.desc: While on holiday in France, there is a murder at the docks and Colonel March is asked by a friend of the French police to assist.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Second Mona Lisa
programme.desc: The Second Mona Lisa,' painted six months after the first, is targeted by rival collectors. Colonel March is determined to reveal the truth.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Death In Inner Space
programme.desc: A scientist seeks a way to suspend bodily life functions during space travel, and his test subject dies from lack of oxygen. Accident or foul play?

programme.title: The Eye
programme.desc: A blind girl receives a cornea transplant so that she is able to see again. However, she gets more than she bargains for when she realizes she can see disturbing ghosts.

programme.title: Island Escape
programme.desc: A rescue team is sent to a remote island which is surrounded by a wormhole which resets time every 3 days, and also crawling with hideous monsters.

programme.title: Grumpy Cat's Worst Christmas Ever
programme.desc: Grumpy Cat is an Internet meme sensation with over 6 million Facebook friends, who has graced the cover of New York Magazine, is the spokescat for Friskies, appeared on American Idol and the MTV Movie Awards.

programme.title: A Country Christmas Story
programme.desc: Musical icon and multiple Grammy Award winner Dolly Parton and Grammy Award nominated R&B singer and producer Brian McKnight star in this Lifetime Original Movie.

programme.title: Christmas For Three
programme.desc: When a successful bachelor suddenly finds himself as the guardian of a 10 year old boy, he leans on the smart and beautiful social worker for help, only to fall in love with the woman who turned his life upside down.

programme.title: 2019 FIFA Women's World Cup
programme.desc: From July 3, 2019.

programme.title: Marta, Legend of the FIFA Women's World Cup™
programme.desc: Enjoy Marta's performances wearing Brazil's jersey against the United States in China 2007™ and against Italy in Brazil 2019™.

programme.title: FACTS
programme.desc: Spain overcomes England in the final in Sydney.

programme.title: 2019 FIFA Women's World Cup
programme.desc: Football entertainment for fans! Watch documentaries, original series and select live matches as well as historic moments from the FIFA World Cup™️, FIFA Club World Cup™️, FIFA Women's World Cup™️ and more.

programme.title: Everly
programme.desc: Fighting back after four years as a yakuza sex-slave, a woman (Salma Hayek) matches wits and weaponry with a legion of killers who are out to collect the bounty on the heads of her and her family.

programme.title: American Assassin
programme.desc: Cold War veteran Stan Hurley takes CIA black ops recruit Mitch Rapp under his wing, and they join forces with a lethal Turkish agent to stop a mysterious operative who wants to start a global war.

programme.title: 24 Hours to Live
programme.desc: After a mercenary dies in a brutal firefight, a new regenerative surgery gives him a second chance at life and another shot at redemption.

programme.title: Snooker 900

programme.title: The Creator Clash

programme.title: 900 Seconds with...

programme.title: Digging For Britain
programme.desc: Invaders: Dr Alice Roberts visits excavations in Orkney and York on the hunt for Viking relics. Finds include an amazing collection of silver and gold.

programme.title: Digging For Britain
programme.desc: Britannia: A newly discovered town in Devon turns history on its head and there's a shocking find by the Thames - almost 100 baby skeletons.

programme.title: Cursed Treasures
programme.desc: The hunt begins in the historical Kingdom of Benin, Africa. Destroyed in 1897, with its city burned to the ground and precious artefacts looted, did this bloody and violent end lead to a curse?

programme.title: Cursed Treasures
programme.desc: The hunt for Cursed Treasure begins in Cheshire, England where a discovery by peat-cutters revealed a story of violence, ritual sacrifice and even whispers of a curse.

programme.title: Cursed Treasures
programme.desc: The hunt for Cursed Treasure takes us to India at the time of the Mughal Empire and a jewel that is linked to centuries of greed and bloodshed.

programme.title: Cursed Treasures
programme.desc: The hunt takes us to the Parthenon in the ancient city of Athens, where the removal of some priceless artefacts brought shipwreck, imprisonment, loss, and disfigurement.

programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel head to Larivee, California to find the Pioneer's Bear Flag.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Emperor's Bride
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are in Moose Bay, Alaska looking for the white jade sarcophagus of a Chinese Empress. Sydney runs into fellow relic hunters Dallas Carter and Kurt Reiner.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: A spoiled princess is kidnapped by a fish monster seeking marriage. Her pride blinds her to the monster’s true heart until Monkey intervenes.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: After eating strange mushrooms, the pilgrims lose their memories. Monkey joins bandits who mistake him for a banished prince of fungus.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: In the Land of Search for Understanding, the king tests every traveler’s wisdom. Monkey learns that true knowledge lies in compassion, not intellect.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: When the pilgrims bathe in a mysterious pool, they turn into babies. Tripitaka learns it’s the Fountain of Youth, guarded by the Spirits of Time Passed.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Starving and lost, the pilgrims find a quiet town with hidden dangers. They learn that not all demons are enemies, nor all humans pure.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A scandal magazine prints a desperate woman's (Dorothy Malone) stories about her many nights with Ironside; guest William Schallert.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside investigates the fatal shooting of the son of Fran's divorced friend (Mary Ure); guests Clu Gulager, Herb Edelman.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside has a chance encounter with an old flame (Dana Wynter) who plans to steal a jade tiger the chief is guarding.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A badly beaten attorney (James Olson) describes an unconscious man aboard a sinking boat.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A couple (Sharon Gless, Russell Wiggins) disappears while throwing a "haunted house" party in an abandoned mansion.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside is accidentally tipped to an organization that is illegally supplying Mexican domestics to U.S. families.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Filial Duty
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) investigate the robbery and murder of a 70-year-old recluse as Charlie Cagney (guest star Dick O'Neill) is hospitalized with pneumonia. Meanwhile, a pregnant Lacey must learn to adapt her work routine.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Old Ghosts
programme.desc: Cagney is branded as a coward after a robbery suspect is able to elude her during a chase. She is suspended from duty, leaving Lacey to clear her name. Meanwhile, Cagney's brother Brian visits from California and checks in on their father.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Power
programme.desc: When Cagney is placed in charge of the 14th Precinct during Lt. Samuels' vacation, her fellow detectives accuse her of being on a power trip. Meanwhile she is disappointed that one of her first assignments is to force Lacey to go on maternity leave.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Play It Again, Santa
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) goes undercover with Det. Jonah Newman (guest star Dan Shor) to investigate a series of disappearing Santa Clauses and issues with music rights. Also starring Tyne Daly as Mary Beth Lacey and Al Waxman as Lt. Bert Samuels.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: The Rapist
programme.desc: When Lacey goes out on maternity leave, Cagney's is given a temporary partner temporary partner, Sara Jones. Jones becomes obsessed with a rape investigation and increasingly frustrated with the length of time it is taking to arrest the suspect.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Crimes of revenge are usually single acts of passion. A brew of hatred and restitution boils over in a manic moment of fury. Once caught, revenge killers usually display remorse and atonement.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love Gone Wrong
programme.desc: Love can be beautiful, love can be blind and love can be deadly. Desire and jealousy are powerful forces driving women to dark and horrifying places in their minds.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Nurse Beverley Allitt overdosed multiple infants, Stella Nickell poisoned medicine capsules in stores and Kathleen Follbigg killed four of her own children.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women burn madly with jealousy, an anger so deep they’ll kill to satisfy it. What makes them turn from “green with envy” to “lethal with jealousy?" Find out as we explore their hearts of darkness.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The mind of a female killer is shaped by a complex cocktail of influences. Do people become that way, driven by horrendous events in their lives? Or are some killers born bad?

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Sometimes, when a man and a woman unite, a terrible urge for destruction can awaken in them both. Happy couples become deadly teams, intent on one goal: murder.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Millionaire Murder
programme.desc: A businessman went to Florida to make one last deal before he retired-he never returned home to his millions. Authorities examined who was closest to him and who stood to gain from his disappearance. But this time conventional rules didn't apply.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Cat and Mouse
programme.desc: He was a predator, abducting girls and young women from their own front yards in broad daylight. He was a sadist: phoning one victim's family, taunting them, boosting then dashing their hope, and he wouldn't stop until we stopped him.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Evil Intent
programme.desc: Drops of blood and a torn screen were all that's left to tell authorities what happened to a woman in Indiana. The 21 yr. old victim was taken from her home on a spring morning. She appeared to have no real enemies, there was no clear motive.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Trail
programme.desc: The disappearance of young women triggered a search that spanned the Pacific Northwest. A massive media campaign failed to locate the drifter, who first charmed then killed them. As investigators followed his trail, he always stayed one step ahead.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Firefight
programme.desc: In Miami, a gang of robbers targeted banks and armored cars. They carried assault weapons and weren't afraid to use them. They struck during the day, and sometimes twice a day. For awhile, they seemed unstoppable.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Signed, Your Deadliest Fan
programme.desc: A successful comic book author and illustrator encounters a fan who wants far more than an autograph.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: In the Spotlight

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Fear F.M.
programme.desc: K.T. Mills is a popular radio DJ with a friendly voice. But when one deranged listener becomes obsessed with the woman behind the mic, her life is turned upside down.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Stealth Stalker
programme.desc: When Terri Mendez breaks up with Jose, she doesn't know he's watching every move she makes. When Terri discovers hidden cameras in her bedroom, she realizes there's nowhere to hide.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: The Ties that Blind
programme.desc: Kathy is thrilled when her husband David treats her well, as he often beats her down with insults and abuse. When Kathy tries to escape her marriage, David is not about to let her go.

programme.title: The Case: Lupine Arsene of the Palaces
programme.desc: A breathtaking international investigation worthy of the blockbuster “Catch Me If You Can.

programme.title: The Case: The Final Round
programme.desc: The murder of Mamadou Magassouba, teacher and former boxing champion from Saint Ouen.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Missing
programme.desc: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Some are runaways who find their way home, but others simply disappear. When foul play is suspected, investigators turn to forensics to find the missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Fatal Error
programme.desc: Accidental deaths, suicides, disappearances, and fires; they're an everyday part of an insurance investigator's life. But cases shouldn't be taken at face value. Forensics has become a tool for exposing insurance fraud.

programme.title: The New Detectives: The Unforgotten
programme.desc: Years after a murder has been committed, investigators use advanced DNA analysis to shed new light on crimes that have gone unpunished for far too long.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Camera Clues
programme.desc: Forensic Photography: Forensic photographers are among the first people at a crime scene, capturing vital clues on film. What do the cameras capture that can't be seen first-hand, and who are the men and women who analyze the camera's clues?

programme.title: The New Detectives: Marked For Death
programme.desc: Sometimes killers are careful to leave no fingerprints behind. But methods of the murder itself can leave a lasting impression on police, especially when the tools (or weapons) of a killer's trade leave an innocent victim marked for death.

programme.desc: When a retired military man runs over a pedestrian, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda to determine if it was bad brakes or bad intent.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My First Case

programme.desc: Keith and Ildiko Bettison had been married for decades, with a teenage daughter and an apparently happy life. But when their daughter moved away to university, their relationship imploded into a chaotic world that would end in a brutal murder.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Choice
programme.desc: Paris is marked for execution when he impersonates a power-mad mystic trying to win control of a friendly country by hypnotizing its woman ruler on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Martyr
programme.desc: To keep a student congress from being used as a rubber stamp by a repressive premier (John Larch), the IMF sets Phelps up for capture so he can betray Paris as a turncoat student leader on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Butterfly
programme.desc: The IMF attempts to clear an American businessman in Japan of false charges that he murdered his Japanese wife in "Butterfly," a segment of Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible" series.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Homecoming
programme.desc: Phelps returns to his hometown on personal business, only to find his once happy surroundings in a state of panic caused by a mysterious series of deaths of the young townswomen on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Rebel
programme.desc: Phelps poses as an archeology professor and Dana as one of his graduate students, as the IMF goes to the aid of a group of young guerilla fighters in an effort to obtain from them a notebook containing vital scientific information in "The Rebel"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Killer
programme.desc: Robert Conrad guest stars as a professional assassin whom the Impossible Missions Force must prevent from Carrying out his assignment without knowing the identity of his target in "The Killer" segment of Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Night of the Digging Dead
programme.desc: A custom-built shark cage; 1900s pathologist's dissection toolkit; 1940s embalming pump and one of the first electric bone saws.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Rock and Roll
programme.desc: An auction in Whittier gets ugly when a buyer named Big Dave tries to take it all. After some tough losses, the guys win a state of the art food truck and an off-road rock crawler with dangerous consequences.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Weapons of Past Destruction
programme.desc: Knowing that Hollywood auctions are hit-and-miss, Allen and Ton buy inexpensive lockers that contain a polygraph machine, a samurai sword and a pair of Civil War shotguns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Real Thing
programme.desc: Allen and Ton compete with a notorious deep-pocketed bidder in Oxnard, CA, and score a vintage Coca-Cola vending machine, a vintage desk and a rare 1971 GMC truck.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hook, Line & Printer
programme.desc: A last-minute auction in Norwalk proves challenging when Ton and Allen go toe-to-toe with a real life cowboy couple. When the dust settles, the guys uncover a 3D printer and a grappling hook gun they can't wait to shoot.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Machine Gun Ton
programme.desc: Ton and Allen battle a pair of vicious female auction hunters who have an axe to grind and bid based on spite rather than strategy. And a gatling gun & suit of armor are worth much less than the guys expected.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hot Wheels
programme.desc: '70s sand rail dune racer with rally hemi heads; 1965 replica Mustang pool table; off-road racing gear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Rodeo Ton
programme.desc: 1970s El Toro mechanical bull used to train bull riders; silver WWII era banjo; a collection of 1800s handcrafted hunting duck decoys.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Risk & Reward
programme.desc: Ton & Allen arrive late to an auction. They uncover vintage bear traps and a bounty of street art. If the pieces belong to the artist, RISK, it could be their biggest score ever. If not, they'll be stuck with forged knockoffs.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Ruff Day
programme.desc: Ton and Allen head to an auction in Ton's hometown and end up battling with a big-mouthed buyer. They discover a pair of tranquilizer dart guns and also end up fighting with a K9!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Smoking Ton

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A year after a popular high school senior goes missing, a witness comes forward claiming to know who is responsible for her disappearance. Detectives must unravel a web of lies in order to learn the truth.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Again Hogan uses Klink to deliver information to the Underground but Klink is arrested by the Gestapo for treason on other grounds. Thus Hogan and his men must find a way to free Klink before the Gestapo finds the info on him.

programme.title: Police Interceptors: Episode 8

programme.title: Police Interceptors: Episode 6

programme.title: Police Interceptors: Episode 2

programme.title: Police Interceptors: Episode 10
programme.desc: Hoppsy goes after a disqualified driver who legs it.

programme.title: Police Interceptors

programme.title: Police Interceptors

programme.title: Wild Asia: Monsoon
programme.desc: A visually stunning and dramatic portrait of India’s mighty monsoon as it brings life — and death — to a thirsting land.

programme.title: Wild Asia: A Forest All Seasons
programme.desc: A year in the life of the temperate forest of Japan, where animals and plants must adapt to suit the variations of the climate in order to survive.

programme.title: Wildest Islands
programme.desc: Islands can be home to the most extreme examples of life, the wildest of people and the most dramatic landscapes. Natural selection fuels evolution in the most dramatic way

programme.title: Jungle Planet

programme.title: Wild Baltic Sea: Between Denmark and Latvia
programme.desc: From Denmark’s northernmost corner to the endless beaches of Latvia.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Cutting the Apron Strings
programme.desc: Two different young men both have a bad habit of missing their court dates. Looking over their files Dog senses that they have another trait in common, both are a little too tied to their mothers.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Short Handed
programme.desc: Dog's target today has a history of violence, and apparently plans to re-locate without notifying the proper authorities. Unfortunately the team is missing a key player, Duane Lee is MIA today distracted by his new lady love.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Photo Op
programme.desc: Dog and Duane Lee can't agree about what role Duane Lee should have in the family business. But the family comes together as they set out to hunt a chronic violator with an open warrant and a wife who has an odd request for Dog.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: A House Divided
programme.desc: Dog has dropped Duane Lee from the team. When Leland confronts Dog and Beth about the decision tempers flare. But they have to come together to answer a cry for help from a mother who feels that the safest place for her daughter is jail.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: All Grown Up
programme.desc: Cecily has graduated from High School and Dog believes the time is right to show her what the family business is all about. The rough and tumble world of bounty hunting is very different than the all girls private school she attended.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Fight Like A Girl
programme.desc: This one is close to home. Dog's target on today's hunt is the cousin of Kali, Garry Boy's caregiver. In addition, she has a reputation as a brawler. With Duane Lee still missing from the team Baby Lyssa decides she will step-up in this hunt.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Higher Power
programme.desc: In an attempt to bring the team back together, Dog recruits his pastor, Tim Storey, to be the peacemaker. As Dog begins his hunt for a young man who has trouble showing up at court, Tim has his own mission - convince Duane Lee to meet with him.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Ties That Bind
programme.desc: With Duane Lee back on the team, the rift in the Chapman clan appears over. But will time heal this wound? As the family heads out for the seedier side of Honolulu in search of an erotic dancer, we will find out if the wound is truly healed.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Who's the Boss
programme.desc: When can a bounty hunt also be a date? When Dog and Beth decide to ride in the same SUV as they pursue a run away fugitive, will their different approaches to the investigation lead to a capture and romance?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Bus Stop Bruiser
programme.desc: When an alleged abuser goes on the lame, Dog gathers the team to bring him in. As the leads grow colder Dog's determination only grows stronger. Finally, a hot lead comes in and Dog sets the trap for his prey.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Willie & Korie's Anniversorry
programme.desc: The Robertson family throws a party for Willie & Korie's 25th anniversary, but things take a dramatic turn when Willie and Korie reveal a big secret. Meanwhile, when Jase blames Uncle Si for getting him a parking ticket.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Statue of Imitations
programme.desc: When Willie asks a local chainsaw artist to make him a statue, he gets a big surprise when it's revealed that the statue is of an unlikely subject - Willie himself. Meanwhile, Jep and Jessica attempt to help Kay with her hoarding.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: A Decent Proposal
programme.desc: On a trip to New York, Jase's son Reed proposes to his girlfriend, which inspires his father to fan the flames of romance back home with Missy. Meanwhile, Sadie asks Willie to be a guest lecturer at her business class.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Father Knows Pest
programme.desc: The tables are turned when the HOA comes to Jase for help to rid the neighborhood of a menacing beaver. Little Will has just gotten his learner's permit, and Willie and Si argue over which of them is the better driving instructor.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Wild Wild West Monroe
programme.desc: When Jase and Jep get into an argument over which of them is the rightful heir to their grandfather's old rifle, they decide to settle the argument with a marksmanship contest. Meanwhile, Willie and Korie help Rebecca prepare for her trip to Taiwan.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Half in the Bag

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: There Will Be Flood

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Bingo Star
programme.desc: Willie accompanies Kay to a local bingo tournament and gets seduced by the game, eventually embarrassing himself and Kay with his enthusiasm.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Sadie's Choice
programme.desc: Willie takes Sadie on a tour of a local college in hopes of convincing her to stay nearby after her impending high school graduation.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Children of the Cornbread

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: All the Colors of the Heart

programme.desc: Explore the travel challenges that alien spaceships face, and discover whether humans can tackle interstellar flight.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Examine the possible components of aliens' protective second layer of skin.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: With light from distant stars taking millions of years to reach us, how long might it take for alien life to answer any communication sent into space?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Antigravity: Experts discuss the possibility of advanced alien technology that could allow UFOs to fly at blinding speed or hover effortlessly a few feet above the ground.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Corporate Raiders From Dimension X
programme.desc: Shredder utilizes a hypnotizing device and creates zombies out of CEOs all over the city. Ultimately, the plan is to raise the Technodrome from the centre of the Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Pizza By The Shred
programme.desc: In order to locate the Turtles' lair and destroy them, Shredder opens a pizza parlour. When the Turtles order a pizza, Shredder places a locator-tracking device on it disguised as an anchovy.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Super Bebop & Mighty Rocksteady
programme.desc: Krang creates Cybernetic Clones of Rocksteady, only ten times as strong and ten times as smart.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Blast From the Past
programme.desc: Shredder endeavours to enlist the aid of the ghost of Shibano-Sama, a noble warrior who lived hundreds of years ago, to destroy the Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leatherhead: Terror of the Swamp
programme.desc: The Turtles go south to the swamps when their friends the Frogs -and Napoleon Bonafrog - are in trouble. The source of their predicament is Leatherhead, a half-human, half-alligator mutation.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo's Birthday
programme.desc: It's Michelangelo's birthday - and his good buddies are pretending they're unaware of it.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Usagi Yojimbo
programme.desc: Shredder's Teleporter, which can teletransport objects to a pre­determined location, interferes with Donatello's transdimensional reception - and Usagi Yojimbo, a 14th century Samurai rabbit, pops out of the Turtles' screen.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Case of the Hot Kimono
programme.desc: Agatha Marble helps the Turtles in their pursuit of Don Turtelli, including Splinter's treasured red robe - and holding Happy Hour News' April and Vernon prisoners.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Usagi, Come Home
programme.desc: Shredder has a hare-brained scheme to turn the rabbit from another dimension, Usagi Yojimbo, into an ally of his and an enemy of the Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Making of Metalhead
programme.desc: Krang creates Metalhead, an exact robot replica of the Turtles with even more powers, and directs him to destroy the Turtles. Donatello, however, reprograms Metalhead over to the Turtles' side.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leatherhead Meets the Rat King
programme.desc: Leatherhead The Cajan gator goes into the sewers in pursuit of the Turtles, and encounters the Rat King, who has stolen a tanker­truck of rat poison which he plans to change into a hypnotic gas.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super

programme.title: Bakugan

programme.title: Bakugan

programme.title: Bakugan
programme.desc: V announces a new Bakugan tournament to determine which clan is the most powerful; Dan sulks about not getting to brawl.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Dipsy fetches the others to watch Andy Brown and some children looking at Peacocks. The magical tree appears in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: The Pied Koopa
programme.desc: In Pasta Land, King Koopa uses a magical flute to lure all of the local Mushroom children away from the town, and leads them to his nearby castle.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: The Bird! The Bird!
programme.desc: While venturing in a snowy world, Toad is kidnapped by a nearsighted Birdo who is convinced that he is her missing baby.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Mario of the Deep
programme.desc: Mario, Luigi, Princess Toadstool and Toad have travelled to the underwater kingdom of Aqua Land in a submarine built from a bathtub in order to fight against BarraKoopa.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Mario and the Beanstalk
programme.desc: Desperate for cash, the Marios trade the royal cow for bean seeds. Princess scolds them, and accidentally sneezes, blowing the beans into the yard.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Mush Rumors/The Ugly Mermaid
programme.desc: A Family of Real World Humans stray off the vacation path and find themselves lost./In an underwater battle with King Koopa and his Doom Sub, the Brothers find Mev-tropolis.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: The Great BMX Race
programme.desc: To help Toad pay off his debt to Fry Guy, Mario and Luigi enter a bike race in hopes to collect the prize money. But what they don't know is that it's all a trap planned by Koopa.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Crimes R Us/Life's Ruff
programme.desc: King Koopa and his evil horde orchestrate the escape of an infamous criminal./The mischievous Koopa Kids Hip and Hop snatch King Windbag's magic wand and zap him and Luigi.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Mario and Joliet
programme.desc: In the Land of Romance, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool, who had been called to the Land of Romance by a friend of Princess Toadstool, are currently trapped in a rapidly crumbling building.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Pirates of Koopa
programme.desc: In Pirate Waters, located in Pirate World, Mario and Luigi are in the middle of peeling potatoes onboard a ship.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: The Venice Menace/Super Koopa
programme.desc: When a gondola suddenly warps into the Mushroom Kingdom, Mario and Luigi discover Venice./Kooky Von Koopa makes a magic pendant that gives King Koopa the power to become Super Koopa!

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Stars in their Eyes
programme.desc: In the depths of space, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool are all aboard a yellow spaceship, which is currently traveling through a swarm of flaming meteors.

programme.title: Blown Away
programme.desc: Jeff Bridges and Tommy Lee Jones team up for this action-filled, edge-of-your-seat thriller about a mad bomber terrorizing Boston. Forest Whitaker and Lloyd Bridges co-star.

programme.title: Drive
programme.desc: A Hollywood stunt performer (Ryan Gosling) who moonlights as a wheelman discovers that a contract has been put on him after a heist gone wrong.

programme.title: A Love Song for Bobby Long
programme.desc: A headstrong young woman returns to New Orleans after the death of her estranged mother. Starring: Scarlett Johansson, John Travolta, Gabriel Macht

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: The banks of the mighty Mississippi call the World Poker Tour back to where poker began for a prize pool of over one and a half million dollars - and it's the Devil's to lose.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Behind the velvet ropes, on the most famous street in the world, the Aviation Club de France opens its exclusive doors to the World Poker Tour for a battle of international proportions.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Gus Hansen, the daring young Dane who walked away with this year's World Poker Tour season opener returns to center stage -- for a chance to do the improbable -- reprise his inspiring performance and take his second major WPT title.

programme.title: But I'm a Cheerleader: But I'm a Cheerleader
programme.desc: A cheerleading-obsessed teenager is sent to a strict summer camp when her parents suspect her of being a lesbian.

programme.title: Blacula
programme.desc: The eternally cool William Marshall puts a fresh spin on the age-old legend of the vampire, condemned to wander the Earth with an insatiable lust for blood in "Blacula," often credited as the first African-American horror film.

programme.title: Scream, Blacula, Scream!
programme.desc: Brought back to the world of the living by a voodoo ceremony Blacula (William Marshall) is loosed with insatiable bloodlust upon the population of a small community in the Louisiana back country. Pam Grier also stars in this scintillating sequel

programme.title: The Wild Geese
programme.desc: A British banker hires a group of British mercenaries to rescue a deposed African President from the hands of a corrupt African dictator. Starring Richard Burton, Roger Moore and Richard Harris.

programme.title: Running Scared
programme.desc: Lots of laughs and a great camaraderie is the recipe for two street-wise cops that have decided to quit the force and open a bar.

programme.title: Dead Zone
programme.desc: An elite team of soldiers who, to stop the collapse of humanity, descend on a radiation-poisoned town and perform the ultimate stealth mission using high-tech armor and weapons.

programme.title: Watching Over You
programme.desc: Single mom Sarah moves into the suburbs and starts dating a firefighter, only to find herself the target of an obsessive neighborhood watchman who aims to prove he’s the best man to protect her… even if he has to create the danger himself.

programme.title: Accused at 17
programme.desc: When 17-year-old Bianca's two best friends find out that Bianca's boyfriend cheated on her with fellow classmate Dory, the three of them play a prank on Dory which goes horribly wrong...and Bianca soon finds herself accused of murder by her friends.

programme.title: The Bachelor Next Door
programme.desc: A newly engaged couple becomes intrigued by the young stranger who moves in next door. He's handsome, friendly and very helpful, but he's no stranger.

programme.title: Multiverse
programme.desc: Four brilliant students unleash a parallel reality during a quantum experiment, confronting deadly versions of themselves. As identities blur and tensions rise, only one version can survive—triggering a violent battle for existence and reality itself.

programme.title: Under The Crystal Sky
programme.desc: In the 1800s, in the American Southwest, an Indigenous family, consisting of a mother, father, and daughter; witness a UFO crash near their home. Following the extraterrestrial event, strange occurrences transpire around them.

programme.title: Alien Parasite (The Dustwalker)
programme.desc: When an alien parasite turns people into killing machines, a town must come together to fight back.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Laos
programme.desc: Landlocked and shrouded in historical mystery, Laos is home to dozens of forgotten tribes who reside in its vast rolling mountains and impenetrable jungles.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Vietnam
programme.desc: We are in the Quan Hoa mountains in the Northwest of Vietnam. It is one of the poorest and most isolated regions in the country.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Cameroon
programme.desc: The bravest drivers in Cameroon are named the “Clandos”; the name comes from the word clandestine or illegal.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Java Volcano
programme.desc: Dodging landslides in Tajikistan. Crossing bridges that could collapse at any moment in Madagascar. Battling mountain monkeys in Guyana. Journeying on icy, mountainous roads in Ladkh. Every day, children, migrants and workers undertake incredible journeys

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Ladakh
programme.desc: Ladakh, the most northern state of India, is one of the harshest environments in the world.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Up In the Air
programme.desc: After her husband's acrimonious departure from Buffalo, Kelly has a confrontation that decides whether she, too, will quit.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: When a deadly fire destroys a northern outpost a week before Christmas, Buffalo puts everything aside to come to the rescue. Cargo Manager Kelly receives a shocking diagnosis that renews her fight to quit smoking.

programme.title: Island Escape
programme.desc: A rescue team is sent to a remote island which is surrounded by a wormhole which resets time every 3 days, and also crawling with hideous monsters.

programme.title: Haunting In Connecticut 2: Ghost Of Georgia
programme.desc: When a family moves from the city to a centuries-old house in rural Georgia, they are terrorized by malicious spirits seeking revenge.

programme.title: We Are the Flesh
programme.desc: After wandering a ruined city for years in search of food and shelter, two siblings find their way into one of the last remaining buildings. Inside, they find a man who will make them a dangerous offer to survive the outside world.

programme.title: Christmas For Three
programme.desc: When a successful bachelor suddenly finds himself as the guardian of a 10 year old boy, he leans on the smart and beautiful social worker for help, only to fall in love with the woman who turned his life upside down.

programme.title: I'll Be Next Door For Christmas
programme.desc: When 16-year-old Nicky’s long-distance boyfriend decides to visit for the holidays, she’s determined to spare him her family’s over-the-top Christmas obsession, by staging a fake Christmas dinner in the empty house next door...

programme.title: A Christmoose Story
programme.desc: A large moose crashes through the roof of young Max's garage! A moose who talks! A moose who claims to work for Santa!

programme.title: 2019 FIFA Women's World Cup
programme.desc: Football entertainment for fans! Watch documentaries, original series and select live matches as well as historic moments from the FIFA World Cup™️, FIFA Club World Cup™️, FIFA Women's World Cup™️ and more.

programme.title: 2015 FIFA Women's World Cup
programme.desc: A look at the qualified teams, intercontinental play-off details, dates, venues and more.

programme.title: World Cup Soccer
programme.desc: Watch the full match replay between Belgium and England played at Saint Petersburg Stadium, St. Petersburg. From July 14, 2018.

programme.title: 24 Hours to Live
programme.desc: After a mercenary dies in a brutal firefight, a new regenerative surgery gives him a second chance at life and another shot at redemption.

programme.title: Criminal
programme.desc: Hoping to stop a diabolical plot, the CIA implants the memories and skills of a dead agent (Ryan Reynolds) into the mind of a dangerous convict (Kevin Costner).

programme.title: Everly
programme.desc: Fighting back after four years as a yakuza sex-slave, a woman (Salma Hayek) matches wits and weaponry with a legion of killers who are out to collect the bounty on the heads of her and her family.

programme.title: 900 Seconds with...
programme.desc: Sharing stories from Richie Howson's snooker career, life on the circuit and his passion for the sport.

programme.title: Snooker 900
programme.desc: Live Snooker 900, the new fast and exciting version of the game featuring many of the game’s legendary players in weekly competitions.

programme.title: Snooker 900
programme.desc: Live Snooker 900, the new fast and exciting version of the game featuring many of the game’s legendary players in weekly competitions.

programme.title: Cursed Treasures
programme.desc: The hunt takes us to the Parthenon in the ancient city of Athens, where the removal of some priceless artefacts brought shipwreck, imprisonment, loss, and disfigurement.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Historian Dan Jones visits the South East of England, home to Britain's greatest defensive fortress: Dover Castle.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones visits Lancaster Castle to explore its grisly history of crime and punishment, including the infamous Witches trials and the martyrdom of the Jesuit priest Saint Edmund Arrowsmith.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Join Historian Dan Jones as he travels back in time to explore Caernarfon Castle.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Join Historian Dan Jones as he travels back in time to explore Stirling Castle.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles

programme.desc: The A-Team searches for Hannibal, who disappeared while tracking down stolen plutonium.

programme.desc: Yung-Hu, a lovesick goblin, falls for a married woman, I-Ling. The pilgrims teach them about love, faith, and the path toward enlightenment.

programme.desc: The group meets four sorcerers impersonating them. Monkey and his friends expose the fakes, proving that virtue and truth cannot be copied.

programme.desc: A nightclub psychic (Ross Martin) knows more than the newspapers about a fatal fire; guest Louise Sorel.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Secrets

programme.desc: Terri Harris was a loving mum with no way of knowing that the man she’d met online had a dangerous history of crime, violence and abuse. He would go on to commit a shocking murder spree that would leave him branded a ‘psychopath’.

programme.title: #Dead2Me
programme.desc: Kerry Woolley’s family said she had everything - a loving husband and kids, nice house, smart car and a good job. So when she was gripped by alcoholism, they all rallied round to try and help Kerry get back on her feet.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: The Honjo Masamune, Japan's greatest sword, vanished after WWII. Taken as a souvenir by a US Sergeant, it's now a legendary lost artifact sought by collectors worldwide.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Birthers - Obama's Birth Certificate
programme.desc: Richard interviews several prominent 'Birthers' who present evidence that proves Barack Obama is not eligible to be President because he does not meet the qualifications of a natural born citizen.

programme.title: Myth Hunters

programme.title: Murder Maps: The Blackout Ripper

programme.title: Murder Maps

programme.title: Murder Maps: Terror In The Roaring Twenties

programme.title: Murder Maps: The Brides In The Bath Killer
programme.desc: George Smith had many aliases. He needed them for his many wives who he would soon murder in order to claim the inheritance. Catching this chameleon would be a gargantuan challenge.

programme.title: Murder Maps
programme.desc: Henri Landru targeted lonely vulnerable women left behind by the war. He seduced them with promises of marriage and lured them to houses outside Paris where they vanished

programme.title: Naked Science: Inside The Mind Of Stephen Hawking
programme.desc: Stephen Hawking, though suffering from amyotrophic lateral sclerosis has developed a unique understanding of the universe.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: TORNADO
programme.desc: A tornado is a violently rotating column of air extending from the base of a thunderstorm down to the ground. Tornadoes are capable of completely destroying well-made structures, uprooting trees, and hurling objects through the air like deadly missiles.

programme.title: Naked Science: Magnetic Earth
programme.desc: The Earth hurtles through space protected by an invisible force field, known as a magnetosphere.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: HURRICANES
programme.desc: Hurricanes, Typhoons and Cyclones all the same thing with different names – what they also have in common is their destructive power! Hurricanes are large, swirling storms and winds from a hurricane can damage buildings or trees.

programme.title: Naked Science: Great Lakes
programme.desc: The Great Lakes are sometimes referred to as inland seas; they are the largest freshwater system in the world. Naked Science examines the early history of these amazing bodies

programme.title: Naked Science: Super Flares - Could They Cause Mass Extinction?
programme.desc: Superflares are amongst the greatest events of the Universe. These magnetic explosions can release energy millions of times greater than atomic bombs. They produce streams of highly energetic particles which can be highly destructive to life.

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Dark Side

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Superscopes

programme.title: Arthur: Cast Away/The Great Sock Mystery

programme.title: Arthur: Binky's Music Madness/Brain Freeze
programme.desc: Everyone loves the Bang on a Can All-Stars, a funky experimental music group that's touring around Elwood City. Everyone that is, except Binky. A new ice cream shop has just opened up across the block. Will Brain's shop be able to survive?

programme.title: Arthur: The Cherry Tree/Matchmaker Matchbreaker
programme.desc: Muffy wants a Bouncy Castle at her party, but when her favorite cherry tree is cut down to make room for it, she starts to have regrets. Francine and Muffy scheme to set up their older siblings Chip and Catherine, but plans go awry.

programme.title: Arthur: Dear Adil/Bitzi's Break-Up
programme.desc: Arthur is worried that his letters to his new Turkish pen pal, Adil, will be boring. After all, how can Elwood City compare to Arthur's fantastical ideas about Turkey? Bitzi is breaking up with her boyfriend, and Buster is really sad.

programme.title: Arthur: The Agent of Change/D.W. Unties the Knot
programme.desc: The latest animated hit movie about a boy and his truck has left Muffy and Francine disappointed. Why doesn't there seem to be any cool female characters on screen? After watching "The Wedding Channel," D.W. wants to get married!

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. Tale Spins/Prunella Gets It Twice
programme.desc: What happens when you combine Greek Mythology with D.W.'s imagination? Then, getting two Polly Locket dolls almost ruins Prunella's birthday party. That, and Francine's bad mood--why, she wouldn't even sing the Happy Birthday song!

programme.title: Arthur: The Blackout/Mei Lin Takes a Stand
programme.desc: It's a hot day in Elwood City, and a total blackout leaves its residents without electricity! Will Arthur and DW survive without AC and TV? Binky's baby sister Mei-Lin isn't keen on learning to walk and would rather stick to crawling.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Babysits/Arthur's Cousin Catastrophe
programme.desc: You think running a marathon is hard? Try babysitting for the Terrible Tibble Twins. Next, Arthur's family is hosting the once-a-year-is-more-than-enough family reunion. But a major thunderstorm turns this into a reunion to remember.

programme.title: Arthur: The Butler Did...What?/The Trouble with Trophies
programme.desc: Bailey is missing! Muffy discovers a series of clues and is left wondering, who exactly IS Bailey? Then, everyone loves getting trophies, right? It turns out that Fern could not care less about them.

programme.title: NEW: Great Tank Battles of World War II
programme.desc: The fourth episode sees the Germans well and truly on the retreat and the Allies are able to successfully implement operation Husky: the landing on Sicily.

programme.title: World War II in HD Color
programme.desc: Allies turn the tide in the Atlantic, where initially German U-Boats harass freely convoys to supply Britain. The route to bring American soldiers who will land on D-Day is clear.

programme.title: World War II in HD Color
programme.desc: Their attack on the Soviet Union having failed, the German Army suffers a series of counter-offensives on the Eastern Front. Wehrmacht's losses are huge as the Soviets advance West.

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII
programme.desc: The Battle of Solomon Islands in WW II was a series of naval and air engagements between Allied and Japanese forces, fought around the strategically vital Guadalcanal, resulting in a pivotal Allied victory and turning the tide in the Pacific theater.

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII
programme.desc: World War II aircraft included iconic planes like the Japanese Zero, American F4U Corsair, and the Grumman F6F Hellcat, engaging in intense dogfights and strategic bombing campaigns across vast expanses of the Pacific Ocean.

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII
programme.desc: The Kokoda Track in World War II was a treacherous mountainous trail in Papua New Guinea, where intense jungle warfare unfolded between Australian and Japanese forces during the Kokoda Track campaign, marking a crucial phase in the Pacific theater.

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII
programme.desc: The Battle of the Gilbert Islands in WW II was a pivotal amphibious assault by the U.S. against heavily fortified Japanese positions, resulting in intense, costly fighting and ultimately securing a crucial step in the Central Pacific island strategy.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Deadly Inventions
programme.desc: Wars become even bloodier as new technologies continue to evolve. An international team of experts tests the deadliest weapons upgrades in the history of warfare.

programme.title: Greatest Escapes of WWII
programme.desc: Hitler’s last soldier in America who defied the FBI for 40 years, the Auschwitz prisoners who revealed the secrets of the death camps, and the merciless Nazi who almost got away.

programme.title: Greatest Escapes of WWII
programme.desc: An adrenaline-fuelled dash through nazi-occupied Europe known as ‘The Flight of the Crow’, a death-defying escape across the world’s most perilous mountain range, and the largest escape of world war two - by men who chose death over dishonour.

programme.title: World War Weird
programme.desc: A 23-year-old Hitler, living hand-to-mouth as a painter in Vienna, Austria, discovers a sacred spear in the city's Hofburg Museum

programme.title: Combat Ships
programme.desc: Destroyers and Cruisers showcases ships that with their speed and firepower became the backbones of 20th century navies. We tell the incredible story of USS Laffey, the WW2 destroyer that would come to be known as ‘the ship that would not die’.

programme.title: Hell On Earth WWII
programme.desc: From the Indian border in Burma to China, which has been at war with Japan since 1937, the war grows more savage. In Europe, despite having less resources than when he first made the attempt, Hitler renews his assault on the Soviet Union.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Cashing in on football fever in the bar on the Cote d’Azur. Four-legged guests boost one couple of expats business in France, and can a husband and wife team from Dorset be ready in time for guests in their cave house bed & breakfast?

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun

programme.desc: A newly engaged couple becomes intrigued by the young stranger who moves in next door. He's handsome, friendly and very helpful, but he's no stranger.

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes and Dr. Watson treat an injured man after a fierce encounter that he barely escapes.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Case of the Baker Street Bachelors

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Case of the Diamond Tooth

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Case of the Haunted Gainsborough
programme.desc: Malcolm MacGregan will lose his family's Scottish castle if he can't make the mortgage payment, by midnight.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Case of the Exhumed Client

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes examines an odd story told to him by a member of the 'League of Red-Headed Men'.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur and The Crunch Cereal Contest/D.W. Flips

programme.title: Arthur: Flippity Francine/Muffy Takes the Wheel

programme.title: Arthur: Francine's Split Decision/Muffy Goes Metropolitan
programme.desc: Lakewood Elementary is sure to win the big bowling tournament on Saturday, but Francine's cousin is having his Bar Mitzvah at the same time! Muffy happily accepts an invitation to spend the weekend in the bustling Crown City.

programme.title: Arthur: Whip. Mix. Blend./Staycation
programme.desc: When Rattles's mom starts dating Archie Vanderloo, Rattles finds himself spending time with his twins, but they don’t have anything in common. Arthur offers to babysit so that his parents can enjoy some peace and quiet in the backyard.

programme.title: Arthur: Best Wishes/The Tardy Tumbler
programme.desc: After George has a lucky streak, his friends pressure him to wish for a snow day. Can George deliver? Prunella's excited about making the gymnastics team, until she realizes practice starts at 6am! Will she practice or snooze?

programme.title: Arthur: Locked In The Library!/Arthur Accused!
programme.desc: Arthur and Francine are fighting. But when they get locked inside the library they either have to make up or prepare for a long evening. And when Buster opens his detective agency, he has no idea his first job will involve Arthur.

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII
programme.desc: The Battle of the Gilbert Islands in WW II was a pivotal amphibious assault by the U.S. against heavily fortified Japanese positions, resulting in intense, costly fighting and ultimately securing a crucial step in the Central Pacific island strategy.

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII
programme.desc: The Marshall Islands were strategically significant in World War II as their capture by the United States provided forward bases for airfields and naval operations, facilitating the Allied island-hopping campaign towards Japan in the Pacific theater.

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII
programme.desc: Battle of Guadalcanal in WW II was a fiercely contested six-month-long campaign between Allied and Japanese forces, primarily fought on land, sea, and air around the Solomon Islands.

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII
programme.desc: The Battle of Peleliu in World War II was a grueling amphibious assault by U.S. forces against heavily fortified Japanese positions on the Pacific island, lasting from September to November 1944 and resulting in significant casualties on both sides.

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII
programme.desc: The fighting on Iwo Jima in WW II involved intense and brutal combat between U.S. Marines and entrenched Japanese forces on a strategically crucial volcanic island in the Pacific.

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII
programme.desc: The Battle of Okinawa in WW II was a fierce and prolonged amphibious assault by Allied forces against well-defended Japanese positions on the island, marking the largest and bloodiest battle in the Pacific theater.

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII
programme.desc: The end of World War II in the Pacific was marked by dropping atomic bombs on Hiroshima and Nagasaki in August 1945, prompting Japan's surrender, formalized on September 2, 1945, aboard the USS Missouri, effectively ending the conflict in the Pacific.

programme.title: WWII In Color: From D-Day to Nazi Downfall
programme.desc: For nearly five years, Hitler's Third Reich has dominated Europe. Germany braces for an Allied invasion, fortifying the Atlantic Wall with steel, concrete, and advanced weaponry.

programme.title: Hell On Earth WWII
programme.desc: From the Indian border in Burma to China, which has been at war with Japan since 1937, the war grows more savage. In Europe, despite having less resources than when he first made the attempt, Hitler renews his assault on the Soviet Union.

programme.title: U-Boat Wargamers: The Wrens
programme.desc: When Gilbert Roberts arrives to set up a tactical school for the U-boats, he receives a frosty reception from Admiral Noble. Enlisting the help of Jean Laidlaw and a small team of Wrens, Roberts begins unpicking the flaws in Walker’s ‘Buttercup’.

programme.title: The Real Hunt for Red October: Part 2

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Civilians On The Battlefield

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the final leg for road trippers Paul Laidlaw and Anita Manning. There are only a few pounds separating this competitive duo as they begin in Norwich, and head for a nail-biting final auction in Stamford, Licolnshire.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Ann Widdecombe and Craig Revel Horwood, with their experts Mark Stacey and Catherine Southon, travel from Colyton in Devon through Somerset buying antiques and ending up at an auction in Southend-on-sea.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Two of the Dragons, Deborah Meaden and Theo Paphitis, go head-to-head with the help of Mark Stacey and Thomas Plant, scouring the West Country for antiques starting in Honiton Devon and ending up at an auction in Crewkerne, Somerset.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Top Chef

programme.title: Top Chef

programme.title: Top Chef

programme.title: Top Chef

programme.title: Top Chef
programme.desc: The contestants make their own hot sauce; the chefs butcher and cook a 300-pound pig.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Madison returns with a Malibu listing that has been on the market for a year; Josh Altman supports his fiancée, Heather, as she lists a condominium building; Josh Altman and Josh Flagg face off over who is the top agent in town.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Josh Altman and Josh Flagg have an explosive showdown; Madison works against the clock to close the deal on his PCH listing; David enlists James' help to deal with the sale of his own home; Josh Altman celebrates the launch of his book.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Heather's pregnancy test puts things into perspective for Josh Altman; James and David may walk away from the St. Ives listing; Josh Flagg shifts his focus to a personal issue; David heads off to Italy to pop the question to Adrian.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Josh Flagg plays mentor to a teenage buyer with an eight million dollar budget; Josh Altman lists a sleek hillside home at a price off-putting to his punk drummer client; David Parnes and James Harris chase a $45,000,000 estate in Holmby Hills.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Josh Flagg's teenage client falls for Josh Altman's multi-million-dollar listing in the Bird Streets enclave, leading to the agents facing off at the negotiating table; James and David's big listing begins to slip away.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Josh Altman lists a stunning modern home with a $2 million-dollar closet, but his client refuses every offer; Josh Flagg takes an Internet mogul shopping for a fixer-upper to flip; David copes with a devastating family issue.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: A plane mysteriously circles the Athens airport. It doesn’t answer air traffic controllers. The captain and co-pilot are missing but someone else is in the cockpit.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: The crew of Delta Airlines Flight 191 see rain and lightning up ahead, but fly on. Inside the storm, their plane is hit by powerful winds that slam the plane to the ground. 136 people die.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: An inexplicable failure strikes – the loss of two engines on a brand new passenger jet. Powerless at 30,000 ft, the pilot needs all his skill, and a little bit of luck, to get his plane to the airport

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: An explosion rips a hole in the cabin of a DC-10. Investigators recommend ways to fix the problem. Two years later, another DC-10 suffers the exact same problem, with deadly consequences.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: The cabin of a 747 Combi begins filling with smoke. Crew members attempt to fight a fire in the cargo hold. After the plane disappears in the Indian Ocean, a recovery operation is launched.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: An ex-Londoner’s celebrity night in the bar in the south of France. A couple from Kent face bad news about their application for a glamping site in Spain, and in France, at one of the holiday homes, a couple finds a new and profitable market.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A couple try to turn round the fortunes of a failing campsite in France. Two hairdressers from Leicester hope to open a salon in the heart of Benidorm, and Margate bed & breakfast hosts take on an established guesthouse in the Andalusian Hills.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A flood threatens two hairdresser’s new salon in Benidorm. A British couple’s campsite is under the microscope when an inspector calls in France. And two Margate bed & breakfast hosts find out running a guesthouse in inland Spain isn’t that simple.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Two Brits struggle to keep up with the pace as tourists descend on their campsite in France. A couple of hairdressers take their salon to the next level. And novice market gardeners from Yorkshire sow the seeds of their new venture in France.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Disaster strikes for small holders in France. A couple from Oldham take on a bar renovation in Spain, but will they be ready before the summer season ends? And Brits running a campsite in France expand their glamping empire.

programme.desc: Barney is snacking on pistachios...and just can't seem to stop! His young friends try to help by hiding them from Barney. When that doesn't work, they tell him a story to help him stop eating pistachios.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A New Friend
programme.desc: While Barney has fun with his friends every day, there's something special about making a brand NEW friend! When Mr. Boyd's niece, Colleen visits the park, she's eager to make friends with the other kids...but being the "new kid" isn't easy.

programme.desc: Everyone is excited about a fishing contest that is being held in the park; everyone except Ryan, who doesn't want to follow the contest rules. When Ryan is tempted not to follow the rules, Barney tells a story called "The Emperor's Contest."

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends

programme.title: Something's Killing Me

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When a woman discovers the bludgeoned body of her nephew, investigators must unravel the events that led to his demise. With three viable suspects, it takes about a year to crack the case using the smallest piece of DNA evidence from the crime scene.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: UNSOLVED MYSTERIES IN PHYSICS
programme.desc: In the late 19th century, scientists thought all major physics laws were discovered. Now, we realize vast unknowns remain. Despite our understanding, mysteries persist in the physical world.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Bilderbergs
programme.desc: A glimpse backstage at the highly secretive annual gathering of the world's richest and most powerful movers and shakers.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Could vampires be real? A well-known U.S. paranormal investigator and folklorist in New York City recounts the legend and evolution of the vampire throughout history and from culture to culture.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: A fortune in gold is buried in the Rocky Mountains, with only a cryptic map as a clue. For nearly 200 years, descendants of a French expedition have sought it. But the Curse of Treasure Mountain has thwarted all attempts to find the hidden bullion.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Fake Arab Spring?
programme.desc: Who was really behind a series of revolts, protests, and uprisings that swept the Middle East starting in late 2010?

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: The discovery of an ancient copper scroll in a Jordanian cave leads to a lifelong quest by a young British scholar in the search for lost Jewish Treasure.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: California Gold Rush prospector goes in search of a legendary lost treasure ship in the Mojave Desert.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Archeological Museum of Athens
programme.desc: From a dodgy archeologist who discovers a golden mask to an ancient gadget that reveals the future, discover the secrets inside the National Archaeological Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the State Hermitage Museum
programme.desc: From ancient mummies who sport tattoos to re-examining who really killed Rasputin, discover the secrets inside the State Hermitage Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Maritime Museum, London
programme.desc: From the musket shot that killed Admiral Nelson to an anti-piracy commando raid, discover the secrets inside the National Maritime Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Kunsthistorisches Museum, Vienna
programme.desc: From the alchemy of turning silver into gold to a dance craze that changed history, discover the secrets inside the Kunsthistorisches Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Pergamon and Neues Museums, Berlin
programme.desc: From Vikings who break unbreakable swords to curators who solve the world’s hardest jigsaw puzzle, discover the secrets inside the Pergamon and Neues Museums.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: MEGAFLOODS
programme.desc: Water covers two thirds of the earth’s surface, and we are utterly dependent on it, but when this vital ingredient of life unleashes its fury on the planet it becomes the ultimate bringer of death.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: MANMADE
programme.desc: When it comes to disasters, mother nature has mankind beat. However, as mankind expands, evolves and technology advances, it comes with dangerous challenges. When errors are made or unforeseen circumstances occur, the results can be devastating.

programme.title: Naked Science: The Big Bang - The First Three Seconds
programme.desc: 13.7 billion years ago there was absolutely nothing. No space, no time, and no matter. Naked Science follows the first three seconds of creation when a speck of light appeared from nothing and rapidly expanded into an enormous Universe.

programme.title: Wonders: Are We Alone?
programme.desc: NOVA Wonders checks in with the explorers now searching the galaxy for life and intelligence on other planets and asks, if we do find other life in the universe…then what?

programme.title: scienceNOW: Can We Make it to Mars?
programme.desc: NOVA scienceNOW reports from the frontiers of science. This program examines Space Dangers; Space Suits; Space Food; Plasma Rockets; and a profile of space roboticist and JPL engineer Vandi Verma.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Edge of The Universe
programme.desc: The night sky is a time machine. The further we look out into the universe the further back in time we reach.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Gemini Advances - NASA refines the techniques needed for rendezvous. Cassini at Saturn - In the Cassini probe's final years of activity, its handlers are asking it to do more complex and risky assignments.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Apollo Program Begins - At the very beginning of NASA's moon project things go wrong. Caves - ESA's special training program for astronauts. Planck - Mapping the cosmic microwave background radiation.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Inside Outer Space: Episode 1: The Solar System
programme.desc: This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see, how we can live in space and what science tells us about the past and the future as we journey inside out of space.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Heavy Lift
programme.desc: New heavy lift rockets are taking to the sky. Falcon Heavy, SLS, Arianne 6 and Vega C rockets are primed to begin the next phase of space expansion.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
